channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AT&T debuts SplitPay, making it easier to split the bill on shared plans
item.description: The upside of friends, roommates, or family members sharing a multiline phone plan is everyone has a lower monthly bill. The downside, however, is one person is ultimately responsible for both paying that bill—and gathering what is owed to him or her from their friends each month.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon MGM Studios acquires the license to thrill as its gains full creative control of the entire James Bond franchise in landmark deal
item.description: The entertainment industry has been left shaken and stirred by Amazon's acquisition of the 007 brand.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Las aplicaciones empresariales obsoletas pueden nublar su visión de la IA
item.description: Las aplicaciones de software obsoletas están creando obstáculos para la adopción de la IA en muchas organizaciones, y la capacidad limitada de retención de datos es una de las principales causas, según los expertos en TI.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Apple Testing Reverse Wireless Charging on iPhones
item.description: Rumors suggest Apple is testing reverse wireless charging for its upcoming iPhone 17 Pro and Pro Max models, with four new flagship models expected to debut in September.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Last of Us season 2's release date has been set for mid-April, and I'm certain that I know when its next trailer will arrive
item.description: HBO has confirmed that its hugely popular dystopian drama series will return in less than two months.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: La lezione del low-code che i CIO possono applicare all’agentic AI
item.description: Con il passare del tempo, la GenAI si sta trasformando sempre di più da un chatbot a cui si fanno domande, a un set di strumenti ai quali si chiede di fare qualcosa e l’agentic AI [in inglese] – l’espressione un po’ goffa con la quale si definisce questo approccio – sta rendendo sempre più chiaro ch
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI-generated images can be art. They just can’t be photos
item.description: As a kid of the 1970s, I was fascinated by a short-lived art movement known as photorealism. The painters who practiced it created works that weren’t merely realistic. They were borderline indistinguishable from photographs—an extraordinary feat to pull off with oil on canvas.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Rivian’s CEO talks AI, self-driving cars, and a $5.8 billion partnership with Volkswagen
item.description: As demand for EVs declines, electric automaker Rivian is taking this time to adapt its business and expand its brand.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: VMware by Broadcom: Product, service and support news
item.description: News of Broadcom’s plans to acquire VMware triggered concerns among customers, partners, and industry watchers, many of whom recalled Broadcom’s track record with prior high-profile acquisitions, including network switching vendor Brocade in 2016 for almost $6 billion, software firm CA Technologies
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: This startup wants to be Shopify for indie filmmakers
item.description: A new startup is leaning on the power of recommendations to spread the word about indie films. Olyn offers a direct-to-consumer platform for film and video distribution, enabling filmmakers to retain up to 90% of their revenue.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Fortinet speeds threat detection with improved FortiAnalyzer
item.description: Fortinet has reinforced its FortiAnalyzer security analytics and log management platform with capabilities that enhance enterprise threat detection and automate incident response. FortiAnalyzer securely collects logs from Fortinet devices such as FortiGate firewalls and endpoint security agents.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Confidence in air safety slips after DC crash: Survey
item.description: Confidence in air safety and federal government agencies that help sustain it has dropped in 2025 after the deadly Reagan National Airport crash near Washington that killed 67 people, according to a new survey that was released on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: How to use asyncio: Python’s built-in async library
item.description: Python’s asynchronous programming functionality, or async for short, allows you to write programs that get more work done by not waiting for independent tasks to finish. The asyncio library is a set of tools included with Python for asynchronously processing disk or network I/O.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Why CX is every brand’s biggest opportunity
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: John Sabino, Fast Company

item.title: AI hallucinations could get lawyers fired, law firm says
item.description: U.S. personal injury law firm Morgan & Morgan sent an urgent email this month to its more than 1,000 lawyers: Artificial intelligence can invent fake case law, and using made-up information in a court filing could get you fired.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Airbnb sues New Orleans after it adopts sweeping regulations governing short-term rentals
item.description: Airbnb is suing the City of New Orleans for requiring the company and other short-term rental platforms ensure properties they market are in compliance with city regulations.
item.dc:creator: Jack Brook, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Experts give up hope for 157 false killer whales stranded on a beach in Australia's Tasmania state
item.description: Marine experts have given up hope of rescuing more than 150 false killer whales that stranded on a remote beach on Australia’s island state of Tasmania.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Virginia Tech researchers raise red flags about mixed-reality security
item.description: In a new study, researchers at Virginia Tech spelled out a variety of security hazards that could compromise mixed-reality systems. The researchers highlighted security threats involving the manipulation of virtual objects when users collaborated via mixed reality headsets.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Elon Musk doesn’t work for DOGE, says White House as battle for government servers intensifies
item.description: Attempts to challenge the power of Elon Musk and his DOGE team to close down government departments have hit an unexpected complication: according to the White House, the entrepreneur is not even in charge of the operation.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Musk's xAI claims new Grok 3 model performs better than rivals
item.description: Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence (AI) company, xAI, claimed Tuesday that its newest model outperforms similar products from competitors like OpenAI and DeepSeek.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Mexico presses case against Google over Gulf of America name change
item.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum accused Google on Monday of violating the country's sovereignty, leaving open the possibility of a lawsuit over the tech company labeling the Gulf of Mexico as the Gulf of America in its maps feature.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Scout Motors' effort to directly sell its electric SUVs where they'll make them stalls
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Legislation to let Volkswagen-backed Scout Motors sell its electric SUVs directly to people in South Carolina, where the vehicles will be built, has stalled after fierce opposition from traditional automobile dealers.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How to mature your IT infrastructure forward while also mining backward for gaps
item.description: Creating a forward-thinking framework that keeps sight of what came before makes disruption and digital maturity possible, says Leidos CIO Alexandra Guenther. The post How to mature your IT infrastructure forward while also mining backward for gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Roberts, Federal News Network

item.title: Musk says he'll withdraw $97.4 billion bid for OpenAI if ChatGPT maker remains nonprofit
item.description: Elon Musk says he will abandon his $97.4 billion offer to buy the nonprofit behind OpenAI if the ChatGPT maker drops its plan to convert into a for-profit company. “If OpenAI, Inc.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation
